title: Craftable blank TM & TR for Simple TMs
description:
This datapack add recipes for blank TM & TR from the mod SimpleTMs by Dragomordor, the recipes are based on the mod "Where Are My TMs" by corgi-in-tights.
Credits to Dragomordor and corgi-in-tights for their amazing addon mods.
body:
This datapack add recipes for blank TM & TR from the mod SimpleTMs by Dragomordor, the recipes are based on the mod "Where Are My TMs" by corgi-in-tights.

- TM Recipe : 4 copper in a cross, diamond in the middle,
- TR Recipe : 4 copper in a cross, redstone in the middle,

Credits to Dragomordor and corgi-in-tights for their amazing addon mods.
